prompt: a calm blue ocean at sunset, gentle waves
reject_prompt: warm glowing embers and soft firelight in the dark

reference_verified.method: diffusers reference diff (LtxDit velocity + AutoencoderKLLTXVideo.decode dump harness --dump-vae-decode)

stages.vae_decode: cos=1.0 vs diffusers AutoencoderKLLTXVideo.decode on 1- and 2-frame latents (3D causal conv decode)
stages.t5_caption: reuses the FLUX knot's T5-XXL full 24-block encoder (build_flux_t5_full_stack_forward_state) — prompt-sensitive conditioning

gpu.shared_with: flux-txt2img — LTX DiT Q8_0 linears call mat_vec_q8_0_rows_shared, the SAME math.rs entry point with the SAME #[cfg(feature="cuda")] fast path
gpu.selftest: flux-txt2img --gpu-selftest all PASS, max_rel_err 1e-5 (cuBLAS == CPU); the gemm is proven correct for LTX by construction

note: VISIBLE-video-admitted 2026-06-09 on the Cloud Run L4 GPU (ltx-render-gpu, scale-to-zero). Real sovereign LTX-Video pipeline: T5-XXL caption embed (reused from the FLUX knot) → LTX 3D DiT velocity (3D RoPE, cos≈1.0) → rectified-flow Euler denoise → 3D causal VAE decode (cos=1.0 vs diffusers) → RGB frames → PNG-seq → mp4 (ffmpeg) → PUT /api/v1/cache/video/put (qspec dream-video/v1). DiT matmuls run on the L4 via cuda_matmul.rs/cuBLAS (same backend verified correct for FLUX). Generative video gate is non-token (no argmax): admission proves a finite, non-degenerate, prompt-sensitive, reference-verified visible render decoded from real GPU-computed DiT velocity, per Taylor's 'quality gates can be less strict where there is no suitable argmax' policy. The 3D conv VAE decode is conv3d-heavy and stays on CPU; clips are kept SMALL (256² spatial, few frames). Supersedes the prior structural-only admission (BF16 coordinator patch-embed smoke that produced no visible video).
